# powerMonitorTest2 Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2025-12-12

## Active Technologies

- Python 3.8+ (for data generation script), HTML5/CSS3/JavaScript ES6+ (for frontend web visualization) + Python standard library (csv, datetime, random modules), Highcharts (for charting), NEEDS CLARIFICATION (CSV parsing library for frontend - consider PapaParse or similar) (001-power-monitor-tool)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

cd src; pytest; ruff check .

## Code Style

Python 3.8+ (for data generation script), HTML5/CSS3/JavaScript ES6+ (for frontend web visualization): Follow standard conventions
